description: Concept equivalence plane (OMOP-style) - concept_id_1 -> concept_id_2 with a relationship type (e.g. synonym). Harmonizes reused fields; demo-populated for address components.

fields.name: concept_id_2
fields.description: Target concept ID (the canonical / equivalent concept)

fields.name: relationship_source
fields.description: How the relationship was derived (e.g. demo: address residence apartment)
